expected_discriminator.inconclusive: The live run fails to collect both sampler logs, rollback/selftest fails, or the same-boot codeword slide is not acceptable under the V2276 bounded rule.
expected_discriminator.negative: No classifiable execute_start stack/callsite intersects the firmware_class/qcacld-HDD target stack in the captured post-FWREADY window.
expected_discriminator.positive: At least one execute_start stack/callsite intersects the V2253 firmware_class/qcacld-HDD stack or a source-backed wrapper that reaches it.

next_runner_contract: Before live work, reread GOAL.md and reconfirm rollback image plus recovery/TWRP availability per AGENTS.md.
After boot, run serial-bridge health checks: a90ctl version, status, and selftest.
Collect helper result plus /cache/native-init-v2277-workqueue-exec-stack.log and /cache/native-init-v2277-tail-perf-regs-codeword.log as private artifacts.
Rollback to the selected baseline, then verify version/status/selftest fail=0 before analysis.
Classify workqueue execute_start stacks/callsites against the same-boot codeword evidence using the V2276 bounded UAO-patch-aware rule.
Do not run Wi-Fi scan/connect/DHCP/ping; this oracle only needs the boot_wlan route already embedded in the helper.
Publish only redacted metadata and target-hit summaries; keep raw stack/IP/log samples private.
candidates.summary: V2277 built a focused workqueue execute_start stack/callsite oracle image; the next substantive T1 unit is V2278 rollbackable live validation and same-boot stack/callsite classification.
why_independent: It does not rerun generic CPU-clock sampling.
It does not repeat the completed V2274/V2275 work->func oracle.
It observes worker execution stack/callsite context at workqueue_execute_start, which can link or exclude the V2253 firmware_class/qcacld-HDD stack even when work->func itself has no target hit.
